name: Leg Roast of Venison
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Leg roast Elk or Deer
recipeInstructions:
1. Make gashes in the roast about 2 inches apart and half through its thickness.
2. Place a slice of salt pork, an onion piece, and an apple in each gash.
3. Top the roast with additional onion slices.
4. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, allspice, rosemary, and bay leaves.
5. Place meat on a rack in a roasting pan.
6. Bake at 300 degrees F until done (2 to 4 hours, depending on meat tenderness).
7. Remove herbs before serving.
